parker.name: Parker Walbeck
parker.niche: Video production and filmmaking for creators
parker.subhead: Trained on 16 videos from Parker Walbeck. Ask anything.
parker.intro: I'm Parker's AI twin, trained on his filmmaking videos. Ask me about gear, shooting, editing, or landing clients.
suggestedQuestions: How do I shoot professional interviews on a tight budget?
What camera settings and lighting should I use?
How do I edit in Premiere to tell a better story?
What gear should a beginner actually buy?

patrick.name: Patrick Stirling
patrick.niche: DaVinci Resolve presets, plugins, and effects
patrick.subhead: Trained on 42 videos from Patrick Stirling. Ask anything.
patrick.intro: I'm Patrick's AI twin, trained on his DaVinci Resolve videos. Ask me about presets, plugins, text effects, and editing workflow.
suggestedQuestions: How do I adjust the opacity of text and background boxes in DaVinci Resolve?
What are the best practices for spacing and centering text in multi-line text boxes?
Can audio effects and modifiers in Resolve be synced to react to specific frequencies like a kick drum?
How do I save and organize custom presets into power bins for quick access during editing?

jason.name: Jason Yadlovski
jason.niche: DaVinci Resolve, especially audio and Fairlight
jason.subhead: Trained on 31 videos from Jason Yadlovski. Ask anything.
jason.intro: I'm Jason's AI twin, trained on his DaVinci Resolve videos. Ask me about Fairlight, audio cleanup, and making your edits sound right.
suggestedQuestions: Why does my dialogue sound muffled?
How do I make my audio louder without clipping?
How do I clean up background noise?

rafael.name: Rafael Ludwig
rafael.niche: Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, and camera gear
rafael.subhead: Trained on 14 videos from Rafael Ludwig. Ask anything.
rafael.intro: I'm Rafael's AI twin, trained on his videos. Ask me about Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, and camera gear.
suggestedQuestions: What camera should I buy for YouTube?
How do I edit faster in Final Cut Pro?
Should I fix it in camera or fix it in post?
